rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to implementation-level outputs or subcomponent connections.
Place output range guarantees in component type annexes only when using visible features and concrete bounds.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by respecting scope boundaries: type annexes for visible interfaces, implementation annexes for internal bindings.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible ports or explicitly declared constants, not AADL properties or subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use eq declarations to define boolean range predicates before referencing them in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Avoid using subcomponent port paths in component type annexes.
